Hero.subtitle: I ship fullstack systems that scale and chase golden hour across the Australian coast.

Home.aboutBio1: CS grad from UWA with a Master's in IT, now based in Sydney. I gravitate toward the full picture — from React front-ends to Docker pipelines, from database schema design to CI/CD automation.
Home.aboutBio2: Outside the terminal, I shoot landscapes and street photography across Australia. The same eye for structure that shapes my code drives how I frame a shot — finding patterns in chaos, whether it's a microservice graph or a Sydney sunset.
Home.aboutBio3: Currently open to fullstack and DevOps roles where I can build things that matter.
Home.blogSubtitle: Thoughts on development, photography, and life

About.title: About
About.description: A passionate developer with a strong foundation in software development and DevOps practices.
About.bio1: I'm a recent graduate with a Master's degree in Information Technology from The University of Western Australia, specializing in Software Engineering and Data Science. My journey in technology began with a strong foundation in mathematics, which has helped me develop analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
About.bio2: Currently, I'm seeking opportunities in DevOps and Full-stack web development roles, where I can apply my technical skills and continue to grow as a developer. I'm particularly interested in cloud technologies and building scalable applications.
About.bio3: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring photography, hiking, or experimenting with new technologies in my personal projects.

interests.photographyDesc: Capturing landscapes and street scenes, exploring different perspectives through my lens.
interests.hikingDesc: Exploring nature trails and mountains, finding inspiration in the great outdoors.
interests.technologyDesc: Staying up-to-date with the latest tech trends and experimenting with new tools.
